name: Rosalind Picard
title: Computer Scientist & Engineer
bio: American scholar and inventor who is founder and director of the Affective Computing Research Group at MIT Media Lab. Pioneer in affective computing and wearable technology.
faith: Picard became a Christian as an adult after being challenged to read the Bible. She has spoken about how her scientific career and faith journey intertwine, and has given talks about being a Christian in the scientific academy.
